name: nextrade
description: NexTrade: live market and news intelligence with stocks, crypto, AI explanations, watchlists, and real-time updates

scripts.check: node --check backend/server.js && node --check backend/sockets.js && node --check backend/routes/ai.js && node --check backend/routes/auth.js && node --check backend/routes/crypto.js && node --check backend/routes/news.js && node --check backend/routes/stock.js && node --check backend/routes/watchlist.js && python -m py_compile ai/predict.py ai/test_predict.py && python -m unittest ai.test_predict
